tree.name: Max Strus
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team sign-and-trade: Heat traded Max Strus to Cavaliers. Cavaliers traded Cedi Osman, Lamar Stevens, and 2030 2nd round pick (CLE own) to Spurs. Cavaliers traded 2026 2nd round pick (LAL own) to Heat.
tree.note: Guard from DePaul, signed 4-year $63 million deal

assetsGivenUp.name: Cedi Osman
assetsGivenUp.note: Forward drafted 31st overall by Minnesota in 2015, rights immediately traded to Cleveland. Played overseas until 2017-18 season. Sent to SAS in Strus S&T
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN drafted Cedi Osman 31st overall in 2015 NBA Draft, immediately traded his rights to CLE

assetsGivenUp.name: Lamar Stevens
assetsGivenUp.note: Forward signed as undrafted free agent from Penn State, sent to SAS in Strus S&T

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 2nd Round Pick via CLE
assetsGivenUp.note: Cavaliers' own 2030 second-round pick, sent to San Antonio in Strus S&T

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick via LAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Lakers' second-round pick, sent to Miami in Strus S&T
